creator: agr@mail.ru
text:
After update from php5.5.27 to 5.5.28  - some sites not work(about 90%)/
Message in http-error text file: [Sat Aug 15 18:54:10.321422 2015] [core:notice] [pid 24458] AH00052: child pid 26566 exit signal Segmentation fault (11)

And this message have some people.

With previous version - all ok.
